staticCommands.description: 🤖 Bionic Monitor - Live Reload for Blazor & Bionic projects

options.description: Use Bionic root directory .bionic/wwwroot (will not mess with files in wwwroot)
Destination root directory - defaults to wwwroot or .bionic/wwwroot with --bionic option enabled
Serving secure port number - defaults to 5001
Enable if app already provides SignalR lib
Source root directory - defaults to wwwroot
